title: cyclosorus bordenii
intro: Cyclosorus bordenii, also known as the Borden's fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been utilized in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Cyclosorus bordenii include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or decoction, and its leaves can also be used in herbal preparations such as infusions and poultices.
